name: Segment
description: A segmented control component for single or multiple selection with visual indicator and size variants.
usage_guidelines: Use for mutually exclusive options (single mode) or multi-select (multiple mode).
Compose with SegmentItem components for options.
Handle onChange to respond to selection changes.
Visual indicator shows active selection in single mode.

styling_info.visual_description: Horizontal group of segments with rounded container. Active segment highlighted with sliding indicator (single mode) or individual highlighting (multiple mode). Gray background with primary color for active state.

Do: Use single mode for mutually exclusive choices
Use multiple mode for filter selections
Dont: Don't use for too many options (use Select)
Don't use for binary choices (use Switch)
Don't forget to manage selection state
